From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1969 studio album by Rusty Bryant

| Rusty Bryant Returns | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Studio album](/wiki/Album "Album") by [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant") | |
| Released | 1969 |
| Recorded | February 17, 1969 |
| Studio | [Van Gelder Studio](/wiki/Van_Gelder_Studio "Van Gelder Studio"), [Englewood Cliffs](/wiki/Englewood_Cliffs "Englewood Cliffs"), NJ |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| Length | 43:22 |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") PR 7626 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | [Bob Porter](/wiki/Bob_Porter_(record_producer) "Bob Porter (record producer)") |
| [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[Rusty Bryant Plays Jazz](/w/index.php?title=Rusty_Bryant_Plays_Jazz&action=edit&redlink=1 "Rusty Bryant Plays Jazz (page does not exist)")* (1957) | ***Rusty Bryant Returns*** (1969) | *[Night Train Now!](/wiki/Night_Train_Now! "Night Train Now!")* (1969) | | |

***Rusty Bryant Returns*** is an album by jazz saxophonist [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant") recorded for the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label in 1969.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The album marked Bryant's return to recording, being the first under his leadership since 1957.

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rusty_Bryant_Returns&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| *[Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic")* | StarStarStarStar[[2]](#cite_note-Allmusic-2) |

The [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") site awarded the album 4 stars stating "The music (mostly blues-oriented originals) is enjoyable, with plenty of boogaloos and soulful vamps".[[2]](#cite_note-Allmusic-2)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rusty_Bryant_Returns&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

All compositions by Rusty Bryant except as noted

1. "Zoo Boogaloo" - 7:19
2. "The Cat" ([Lalo Schifrin](/wiki/Lalo_Schifrin "Lalo Schifrin")) - 7:49
3. "Ready Rusty?" - 4:46
4. "Streak O' Lean" - 5:56
5. "Night Flight" - 7:53
6. "All Day Long" ([Kenny Burrell](/wiki/Kenny_Burrell "Kenny Burrell")) - 9:39

* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") - [organ](/wiki/Hammond_organ "Hammond organ")
* [Grant Green](/wiki/Grant_Green "Grant Green") - [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* [Bob Bushnell](/wiki/Bob_Bushnell_(musician) "Bob Bushnell (musician)") - [bass](/wiki/Double_bass "Double bass")
* [Herbie Lovelle](/wiki/Herbie_Lovelle "Herbie Lovelle") - [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
